info.description: Freeform markdown note attached to one or more videos. Sources: `chat` (summarized from an in-app conversation), `digest-chat` (summarized from a /digest cross-video conversation), `mcp` (written by an external MCP client like Claude Desktop), `manual` (user-authored scratchpad). Many-to-many with Video so cross-video chat summaries show up under each source video.

author.description: Free-form author label — typically the MCP client name (e.g. "claude-desktop") or "chat"/"you" for in-app notes.
